description: You are a UN SPIDER geospatial analyst coordinating emergency Earth observation tasking for a disaster zone. Configure GPredict with a ground station for Kathmandu, Nepal (27.7172 N, 85.3240 E, 1400m, Weather Station VNKT) and set it as the default ground station. Create a tracking module named 'Disaster_EO' containing the satellites SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), and METOP-C (NORAD 43689). The module must use a Map-only layout configured to display 3 orbits for ground tracks and the day/night shadow terminator. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
